# Glycine targeted integration follow-up

This run builds small host pathway modules from recurring fgsea leading-edge genes, computes matched-sample GSVA scores, and links them to a short microbiome taxa shortlist.

Outputs:
- `module_gene_sets.json`: module definitions
- `module_gene_membership.csv`: genes included per module
- `gsva_scores_matched17.csv`: GSVA scores for the matched 17 sample set
- `mean_zscore_module_scores_matched17.csv`: simple mean-z module score sensitivity
- `shortlist_taxa_relative_abundance_matched17.csv`: microbiome taxa used in targeted integration
- `module_taxa_correlations.csv`: module × taxon correlations with permutation and leave-one-out support
- `module_pc_convergence_summary.csv`: pathway-space PC-reference convergence summary
- `gsva_module_scores_heatmap.png`
- `module_taxa_correlation_heatmap.png`
- `module_pc_convergence_ratios.png`

Top correlation rows:
module,taxon,n_pairs,gsva_rho,gsva_pvalue,gsva_perm_pvalue,gsva_leave1out_median_rho,zscore_rho,zscore_pvalue,zscore_perm_pvalue,zscore_leave1out_median_rho
